The '''''Warhawk''''' was a [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] [[MC40a light cruiser/Legends|MC40a light cruiser]] owned and operated by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==History==
The ''Warhawk'' participated in a mission to rescue defected [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces on the [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Protector (Victory I-class)|''Protector'']]. The ''Warhawk'' engaged the loyalist Imperial interdictor ''[[Harpax]]'', which was attacking the ''Protector''. Although able to corner the interdictor with the assistance of one of the late Admiral [[Harkov]]'s Nebulon-B frigates, ''[[Akaga]]'', its starfighters were prevented from launching direct attacks against the interdictor.

Upon the arrival of [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Vader]] on the [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial I''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Garrett (Star Destroyer)|''Garrett'']], the ''Warhawk'' was destroyed by in a torpedo attack by loyalist Imperial starfighters spearheaded by [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]] before it could close within cannon range of the interdictor. Its Imperial allies about the ''Protector'' were annihilated by loyalist forces soon after.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']]
